arts.ttl: Chelsea interested in Lyon prospect Enzo Molebe
arts.sum: Chelsea are closely monitoring Lyon prospect Enzo Molebe (17), according to a report this Friday from Le Parisien. The 17-year-old striker is touted as being one of the most promising…

arts.ttl: Man Utd could target Nkunku as Chelsea consider Garnacho offer
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku has emerged as a potential Manchester United target in this window as Chelsea consider making a move for United forward Alejandro Garnacho.

arts.ttl: How Girona could benefit from Man City’s next January deal

arts.ttl: Essential Football pod: Man City vs Chelsea - the big preview
arts.sum: Ron Walker and Pete Smith preview the Saturday Night Football clash between Manchester City and Chelsea in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man Utd face wonderkid HUMILIATION as Arsenal, Man City eye deal
arts.sum: Manchester United are at risk of missing out on long-standing target Sverre Nypan, according to David Ornstein, Fabrizio Romano and Norwegian media. According to Norwegian outlet Adresseavisen and since confirmed by Fabrizio Romano, Nypan is expected to arrive in Manchester shortly to tour the facilities of Man City and to hold talks over a transfer.

arts.ttl: Official Liverpool announcement speaks volumes as £203m FSG bonanza follows Man City complaint
Mikel Arteta confirms double Arsenal transfer call as Raheem Sterling loan future decided
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta reveals whether the Gunners could end Raheem Sterling's loan spell from Chelsea during the January transfer window.
